title: UQ-RV-ALNS Code Documentation
subtitle: A source-oriented guide to the research code package: model objects, algorithm entry points, experiment runners, result artifacts, and paper-code alignment.

teaser.alt: Generated algorithm-result artifact referenced by the code documentation.
teaser.caption: Result artifact generated by the experiment pipeline; this page explains which code creates, consumes, and validates those files.

overview: This page is a code documentation entry point, not a paper showcase. It explains how the repository is organized, which Python modules implement the mathematical model and algorithm, which scripts run the experiments, where generated outputs are stored, and which documentation files connect the source code to the manuscript equations, pseudocode, tables, and claims.

result_highlights.label: Source package
result_highlights.value: 18 Python modules under src/uqrv/ cover scenarios, energy, service graphs, solvers, statistics, GIS inputs, and IO.

result_highlights.label: Main experiment runner
result_highlights.value: RUN_REPRODUCE_FULL.ps1 delegates P2 to scripts/run_publishable_experiments.py and produced 640 rows for main_external_portfolio_full_20260625.

result_highlights.label: Proposed algorithm evidence
result_highlights.value: The rebuilt run reports 17.44% to 40.70% mean RWCT reduction versus the strongest external baseline at each scale.

result_highlights.label: Statistical test output
result_highlights.value: scripts/run_statistical_tests.py generated P7 rows with Holm-adjusted paired RWCT p value 0.01367.

result_highlights.label: Validation command
result_highlights.value: RUN_TESTS.ps1 executes the unittest suite that checks model objects, solvers, GIS inputs, publication outputs, and this documentation page.

sections.title: Code Package Overview
sections.summary: The repository uses one shared Python package instead of separate code copies for each paper section. Root wrappers call scripts, scripts call src/uqrv modules, and outputs are written to results/.
bullets: src/uqrv/ contains reusable model, algorithm, baseline, metric, GIS, energy, and statistics code.
scripts/ contains experiment runners, training utilities, table writers, and figure generators.
tests/ contains unittest coverage for the shared package and manuscript-facing output checks.
results/experiments/ stores raw rows, summaries, run metadata, and source material by experiment id.

sections.title: Source Tree And Module Guide
sections.summary: The core modules are grouped by responsibility so readers can enter the code from the model layer, solver layer, experiment layer, or validation layer.
bullets: src/uqrv/scenario.py defines Tower, Stop, Weather, and Scenario data objects.
src/uqrv/energy.py and src/uqrv/energy_surrogate.py estimate sortie energy and surrogate-assisted energy terms.
src/uqrv/stop_batch_model.py builds SortiePattern, ServiceGraph, ScheduleState, and objective diagnostics.
src/uqrv/rv_alns.py implements the proposed schedule-state ALNS path.
src/uqrv/solvers.py implements external baselines such as GA, ACO, simulated annealing, tabu search, VNS, and HGS-VNS.
src/uqrv/stat_tests.py supports paired statistical testing for generated experiment rows.

sections.title: Mathematical Model Implementation
sections.summary: The manuscript model is implemented through explicit same-stop sortie patterns, q95 service filtering, schedule synchronization, and objective-term diagnostics.
bullets: src/uqrv/stop_batch_model.py maps same-stop sortie patterns to SortiePattern and ServiceGraph objects.
build_service_graph() constructs the finite service set and applies q95 feasibility screening.
evaluate_schedule_state() computes vehicle arrival, UAV launch and recovery, tower completion, and makespan.
objective_breakdown() exports RWCT, makespan, ground travel, q95 energy, missed service, duplicate service, and penalty diagnostics.
src/uqrv/priority.py computes the risk-value tower weights used by the objective.

sections.title: Algorithm Implementation
sections.summary: The proposed method is implemented as a complete q95 risk-value schedule-state ALNS with destroy-repair search and final portfolio selection.
bullets: src/uqrv/rv_alns.py exposes solve_schedule_state_alns() as the proposed algorithm entry point.
src/uqrv/alns_operators.py contains destroy and repair operators used by the schedule-state search.
The complete method is the alns_pinn_full code path used in the P2 main comparison.
Final schedule selection minimizes infeasible-sortie count first, then RWCT, then makespan.
src/uqrv/solvers.py keeps external baselines separate from the proposed ALNS implementation.

sections.title: Experiment Pipeline
sections.summary: Experiment wrappers route each experiment id to the correct script and keep generated data under stable result directories.
bullets: RUN_REPRODUCE_QUICK.ps1 runs small verification-scale experiment jobs.
RUN_REPRODUCE_FULL.ps1 runs manuscript-scale experiment jobs with explicit ExperimentId and RunId arguments.
scripts/run_publishable_experiments.py handles P2, P4, P11, and other publishable synthetic experiments.
scripts/run_public_gis_case_experiment.py handles public GIS cases.
scripts/run_statistical_tests.py generates P7 paired-test rows from a completed P2 run.
scripts/write_full_result_tables.py regenerates manuscript-facing result tables.

sections.title: Result Artifacts
sections.summary: The code writes raw experiment data, analysis summaries, table files, generated figures, and source-data tables to versioned output paths.
bullets: results/experiments/P2_algorithm_comparison/raw_data/ stores generated rows for main algorithm comparison runs.
results/experiments/P2_algorithm_comparison/analysis_data/ stores summaries and run metadata.
results/experiments/P7_statistical_tests/ stores statistical-test rows and summaries.
results/tables/table_algorithm_results.tex is regenerated from the rebuilt P2 run.
results/figures/rendered/ stores rendered figure assets used by documentation and manuscript outputs.

sections.title: Tests And Validation
sections.summary: Validation is handled by a repository-level unittest suite plus manuscript-output checks for tables, figures, GIS data, and statistical outputs.
bullets: RUN_TESTS.ps1 runs py -3.9 -m unittest discover -s tests -q.
tests/test_stop_batch_model.py checks service graph and schedule-state behavior.
tests/test_rv_alns_schedule_state.py checks the proposed schedule-state ALNS path.
tests/test_solvers.py checks external solver methods and method mapping.
tests/test_publishable_runner.py checks experiment-runner behavior.
tests/test_project_page.py checks that this GitHub Pages entry remains a code documentation page.

sections.title: Paper-Code Alignment
sections.summary: The documentation files record the mapping from equations, algorithm pseudocode, experiment tables, and retained claims to code and result evidence.
bullets: docs/model.md maps manuscript mathematical objects to source objects.
docs/algorithm.md maps pseudocode stages to implementation entry points.
docs/api.md lists the main data structures consumed by solvers and metrics.
docs/experiments.md records the final experiment hierarchy and commands.
docs/claim_algorithm_evidence_ledger.md records what the current evidence supports and what it does not support.

source_files.purpose: Package initializer that exposes the UQ-RV-ALNS simulation package as an importable Python module for all runners and tests.
source_files.paper_role: Keeps the research code usable as one shared package instead of duplicated per experiment subsection.

source_files.purpose: Defines ALNS destroy moves, repair operators, adaptive operator scoring, and simulated-annealing acceptance utilities used by schedule search.
source_files.paper_role: Implements the operator-level details behind the algorithm pseudocode and exported operator diagnostics.

source_files.purpose: Builds clustered candidate stop sets and screens tower-stop service pairs before route and sortie scheduling begin.
source_files.paper_role: Supports the candidate-stop construction and screening experiments reported for scalable corridor instances.

source_files.purpose: Implements deterministic and uncertain UAV energy estimation, including distance, climb, wind, payload, and q95 feasibility checks.
source_files.paper_role: Provides the physical energy interface used by the mathematical model and feasibility constraints.

source_files.purpose: Provides probabilistic surrogate energy prediction, synthetic training samples, and evaluation helpers for surrogate accuracy experiments.
source_files.paper_role: Connects the PINN/surrogate energy branch to the experiment rows and energy prediction accuracy evidence.

source_files.purpose: Loads and writes public GIS case files including towers, candidate stops, roads, weather, metadata, and template documentation.
source_files.paper_role: Feeds geometry-grounded public scenarios while keeping public/proxy evidence boundaries explicit.

source_files.purpose: Centralizes experiment directory creation, CSV writing, JSON writing, Markdown writing, and row summarization helpers.
source_files.paper_role: Keeps raw rows, summaries, and run metadata reproducible across all experiment scripts.

source_files.purpose: Evaluates executable plans into makespan, weighted completion, risk coverage, route distance, energy, and feasibility metrics.
source_files.paper_role: Produces the metric columns used by result tables, figures, and statistical tests.

source_files.purpose: Builds small-instance exact or fallback reference plans for validating heuristic quality on tractable cases.
source_files.paper_role: Supports the exact-reference experiment and gives a calibration point for heuristic result claims.

source_files.purpose: Generates online disruption events and simulates online replanning policy behavior over precomputed inspection plans.
source_files.paper_role: Supports online replanning evidence and separates dynamic-policy experiments from the static main comparison.

source_files.purpose: Computes risk-value tower priority weights and scaled priority maps from scenario risk and task value attributes.
source_files.paper_role: Implements the priority term used by the RWCT objective and risk-value scheduling claims.

source_files.purpose: Creates manuscript-scale synthetic scenarios, custom scenario variants, and experiment matrices with controlled size settings.
source_files.paper_role: Defines the standardized scenario generation layer used by publishable experiment runners.

source_files.purpose: Fetches or builds public GIS inputs from OSM/HIFLD/NASA POWER style sources and writes normalized GIS case rows.
source_files.paper_role: Documents how public geometry and weather are turned into GIS case inputs without overstating field validation.

source_files.purpose: Implements the schedule-state RV-ALNS solver, initial construction, destroy-repair loop, local search, and portfolio selection.
source_files.paper_role: This is the proposed algorithm implementation aligned with the manuscript pseudocode and P2 main method.

source_files.purpose: Defines base data objects for towers, stops, weather, and scenarios, plus synthetic scenario generation utilities.
source_files.paper_role: Provides the common data model consumed by every solver, metric, and experiment runner.

source_files.purpose: Contains the solver facade, plan data structures, external baselines, operator-ALNS variants, and metric-aware schedule selection.
source_files.paper_role: Separates external baseline algorithms from the proposed ALNS while exporting a single experiment-facing solver API.

source_files.purpose: Implements Holm adjustment, paired method comparisons, Wilcoxon-style p values, rank-biserial effects, and bootstrap intervals.
source_files.paper_role: Generates the statistical evidence used after the P2 main experiment rows are produced.

source_files.purpose: Builds same-stop sortie patterns, service graphs, schedule assignments, synchronized schedule states, and objective breakdowns.
source_files.paper_role: This file is the main mathematical-model implementation for sortie sets, timing equations, and objective terms.

source_files.purpose: Audits GIS case metric alignment by reading case CSV rows, ranking metrics, and writing alignment diagnostics.
source_files.paper_role: Checks that public GIS metric interpretation is consistent before those outputs are used in manuscript evidence.

source_files.purpose: Assembles a reproducible delivery package with code, experiment packages, datasets, figure sources, LaTeX, and readme files.
source_files.paper_role: Supports external handoff and archive preparation after code, tables, figures, and validation materials are regenerated.

media_sections.title: Generated Algorithm Artifact
media_sections.caption: Figure asset created from experiment outputs; see scripts/generate_publishable_figures.py and results/figures/ for the generation path.

media_sections.title: Public GIS Artifact
media_sections.caption: GIS case figure created from public/proxy source material; see src/uqrv/gis_case.py and scripts/run_public_gis_case_experiment.py.

evidence.truth: Implements service graph construction, q95 filtering, synchronized schedule evaluation, and objective diagnostics.
Implements schedule-state ALNS and final portfolio selection for alns_pinn_full.
Implements greedy, GA, ACO, simulated annealing, tabu search, VNS, and HGS-VNS baselines.
Generates publishable experiment rows including P2 and P4.
Generates P7 paired statistical-test rows from completed P2 output.
Regenerated manuscript-facing table from the rebuilt P2 full run.

boundaries: This page documents code organization and code-paper traceability; it is not a replacement for running the repository tests.
P2 is the main external-baseline comparison; internal ALNS-family variants belong to P4 ablation.
Top-risk coverage is not uniformly best at small and medium scales.
Public GIS cases use public geometry and weather, but inspection risk and task value remain proxy labels.
AirLab telemetry validates the energy branch only; it is not full utility inspection field validation.
